case_title: MANGU D. PATEL VS. FUNANISH ANTHONY ANTHONY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, MANGU D. DBA FRANCES HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT ANTHONY, FUNANISH ANTHONY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ANTHONY, FUNANISH ANTHONY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, MANGU D. DBA FRANCES HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTHONY, FUNANISH ANTHONY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2084 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, UNIT 311, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ANTHONY, FUNANISH ANTHONY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANTHONY, FUNANISH ANTHONY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, MANGU D. DBA FRANCES HOTEL SERVED SEP-27-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANTHONY, FUNANISH ANTHONY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $23.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, MANGU D. DBA FRANCES HOTEL
